name: Crackling Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift cornmeal, salt, and soda together.
2. Add milk and stir in cracklings.
3. Form into oblong cakes and place on greased baking sheets.
4. Bake, hot, for 30 minutes.
5. Cracklings: Cut fat into thin 1-1/2 inch squares.
6. Fry in deep fat until curled and golden brown.
7. Drain cracklings on absorbent paper.
8. Serve warm or cold or use for crackling bread.
CRACKLINGS:
Cut fat back into thin 1-1/2 inch squares. Fry in deep fat until they are curled and golden brown. Drain cracklings on absorbent paper.
